description: An individual is planning to sell a large amount of stock and wants to understand the tax implications.

nodes.task_description: Determine the cost basis and holding period for the stock being sold.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the basis and determines the gain will be long-term.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the estimated capital gain from the sale.
Estimate the total capital gains tax due and advise the client on setting aside funds for the tax payment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a clear estimate of the tax liability and advises the client accordingly.
